• Campaigns

Petition: No 24-Hour Gambling in Crystal Palace

  • Steve Reed
  • February 16, 2026

Admiral Casino, an adult gambling centre on Westow Hill is currently open from 9am- 11pm. They have recently submitted a planning application to keep the centre open 24 hours, 7 days a week. There have been concerns raised about what this change will cause in terms of anti social behaviour, and the character and identity of The Triangle.

Working with the local Labour team, I am urging Croydon Council to take the above factors into consideration. If you agree, please sign my petition by clicking here.

 

Share
Share
Tweet

Admiral Casino Application Paused

Petition: No 24-Hour Gambling in Crystal Palace

How Labour’s Autumn 2025 Budget Impacts You

At Facebook-square Twitter Instagram

Steve Reed is the Labour MP for Streatham and Croydon North and Secretary of State for Housing, Communities and Local Government. In 2018 his private member’s bill on reducing violent mental health restraint became law. In June 2019 he launched Labour’s civil society strategy outlining radical plans to empower citizens and communities.

Steve chairs the Cooperative Councils Innovation Network, co-chairs the All-Party Parliamentary Group for London, was Leader of Lambeth Council 2006-12 where he led the council’s children’s services to become best-rated in the country and pioneered the public-health approach to tackling violent youth crime. He worked in publishing for 16 years and was an elected trade union branch secretary.
